programs.title: Flyboys
programs.desc: Several Americans volunteer for the French military before the U.S. enters World War I.

programs.title: Beauty and the Beast
programs.desc: A live-action adaptation of Disney's 1991 animated classic fairy tale.

programs.title: All I See Is You
programs.desc: A man starts to feel insecure when an operation allows his blind wife to see out of her right eye.

programs.title: A Walk to Remember
programs.desc: A young delinquent (Shane West) falls for a minister's (Peter Coyote) daughter (Mandy Moore).

programs.title: Sophie's Choice
programs.desc: A writer (Peter MacNicol) meets an Auschwitz survivor (Meryl Streep) and her lover (Kevin Kline).

programs.title: Elegy
programs.desc: A beautiful student (Penélope Cruz) awakens feelings of sexual possessiveness in an aging professor.
